content: Your Brand name will be displayed in invitations, notifications, and other places where your {{productName}} name is referenced.

comment.text: This translation key is used for a subtitle that describes the usage of the brand name in various contexts, such as invitations and notifications. It provides context for users who see this text, especially those who are not familiar with {{productName}}.

usage.context:
<Text
 className={classNames(styles.wlSubtitle, "wl-subtitle")}
 fontSize="13px"
 >
 {t("BrandNameSubtitle", { productName: t("Common:ProductName") })}
 </Text>
 
 <div className="settings-block">
 <FieldContainer id="fieldContainerBrandName" isVertical>
 <TextInput

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Azerbaijani translation incorrectly implies that the user's name is being referenced ('adınız {{productName}}'), whereas the English text states that the product name is being referenced ('where your {{productName}} name is referenced').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Brend adınız dəvətnamələrdə, bildirişlərdə və {{productName}} adınızın qeyd olunduğu digər yerlərdə görünəcək.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation '{{productName}} 名' (productName name) is redundant and unnatural in Japanese. In the English source, 'your {{productName}} name' refers to the name of the product itself. The Japanese translation literally translates 'name' as '名', resulting in 'product name name'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: あなたのブランド名は、招待状、通知、および {{productName}} の名前が参照されるその他の場所に表示されます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Portuguese translation says 'onde o seu nome {{productName}} é referenciado', which translates to 'where your name {{productName}} is referenced'. This changes the meaning from 'where your {{productName}} name is referenced' (referring to the product name) to 'where your name [product name] is referenced' (implying the user's name is the product name).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: O nome da sua Marca será apresentado em convites, notificações e outros locais onde o nome do seu {{productName}} é referenciado.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation incorrectly states 'where your {{productName}} name is referenced' as 'где упоминается ваше имя {{productName}}' (where your name {{productName}} is mentioned). This implies the user's personal name is the product name, rather than the product name being the reference point.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Название вашего бренда будет отображаться в приглашениях, уведомлениях и других местах, где упоминается название {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'ftuar' is a verb (to invite) or a past participle, whereas the English text uses the noun 'invitations'. In Albanian, the correct noun is 'ftesa'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Emri i markës tuaj do të shfaqet në ftesa, njoftime dhe vende të tjera ku përmendet emri i {{productName}} tuaj.
